description: The Stidda is a Sicilian Mafia-type criminal organization based in southern Sicily, founded in the early 1980s by former Cosa Nostra members expelled during the Second Mafia War. It operates primarily in rural areas and is known for its star tattoo. The Stidda engaged in a violent conflict with Cosa Nostra in the 1990s, resulting in over 300 deaths. It remains active, with an estimated 2,000 full members.
